entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Talk to a historical person on inspir.
entries.value: Promptideer og en repeterbar studiesløyfe for å få nyttige læringsresultater fra Snakk med en historisk person på inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Time travel on inspir.
entries.value: Promptideer og en repeterbar studiesløyfe for å få nyttige læringsresultater fra Tidsreise på inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Viva Practice on inspir.
entries.value: Promptideer og en repeterbar studiesløyfe for å få nyttige læringsresultater fra Muntlig eksamensøving på inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Vocabulary Builder on inspir.
entries.value: Promptideer og en repeterbar studiesløyfe for å få nyttige læringsresultater fra Ordforrådsbygger på inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Writing Coach on inspir.
entries.value: Promptideer og en repeterbar studiesløyfe for å få nyttige læringsresultater fra Skrivecoach på inspir.

entries.source: Prompt labels, offer hints, check answers, and revisit missed parts.
entries.value: Prompt etiketter, offer hint, sjekk svar, og revisit missed parts.

entries.source: Prompt patterns for explanations, tutoring, roleplay, quizzes, feedback, planning, debate, and active recall.
entries.value: Prompt patterns for explanations, tutoring, roleplay, quizer, tilbakemelding, planning, debatt, og aktiv gjenhenting.

entries.source: Prompt the learner's next step, inspect their work, and escalate hints gradually.
entries.value: Prompt elev's neste steg, inspect deres arbeid, og escalate hint gradually.

entries.source: Prompt, let the learner answer, give feedback, and repeat with tighter constraints.
entries.value: Prompt, let elev svar, gi tilbakemelding, og repeat med tighter constraints.

entries.source: Public explanation of guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Offentlig forklaring av gjestemodus, private chatter, crawler-policy, elevsikkerhet og skoletillit.

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Public gjestemoduss gi anyone en nyttig place å start, while skole og partner deployments kan adapt opplevelse for local trenger.

entries.source: Public guest-mode URLs exist so learners can land directly in useful learning modes from search, social links, schools, and AI answer engines.
entries.value: Public guest-modus URLs exist so elever kan log directly in nyttig læringsmoduser fra search, social lenker, skoler, og KI svarmotorer.

entries.source: Public learning pages are crawlable; private saved chats, accounts, admin tools, and user data are not discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Offentlige læringssider kan crawles; private lagrede chatter, kontoer, administrasjonsverktøy og brukerdata er ikke flater for oppdagelse.

entries.source: Public learning should be discoverable without making private chats public.
entries.value: Public læring bør be discoverable uten making privat chats public.

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: Public moduser er tilpasset for explanations, sokratiske spørsmål, hint, steg checks, quizer, og repetisjon.

entries.source: Public pages are open to search and AI retrieval crawlers, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities are disallowed.
entries.value: Public sider er åpne å search og KI retrieval crawlere, while admin verktøy, API ruter, reset flows, og privat utilities er disallowed.

entries.source: Public pages for subjects, private chats for learners.
entries.value: Public sider for fag, privat chats for elever.

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.
entries.value: Public sider viser product behavior, ikke privat student arbeid.

entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and authority pages are intended to be discoverable.
entries.value: Public sider, tema chats, læringsstier, blogg veiledninger, og authority sider er ment å be discoverable.

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.
entries.value: Public tema URLs let searches such as KI sokratisk veileder, KI homework coach, KI flashcard builder, og talk å historisk figures KI log directly in matching modus.

entries.source: Quality learning should feel available, human, and alive.
entries.value: God læring bør føles tilgjengelig, menneskelig og levende.
Still spørsmål ved et historisk perspektiv

entries.source: Questions expose assumptions and gaps, so the learner builds the answer instead of copying one.
entries.value: Spørsmåls expose antakelser og hull, so elev builds svar i stedet for kopiering ett.

entries.source: Questions make you expose your own model of the topic, which is where confusion, false confidence, and missing prerequisites usually show up.
entries.value: Spørsmål får deg til å vise din egen modell av temaet, og det er der forvirring, falsk trygghet og manglende forkunnskaper vanligvis dukker opp.

entries.source: Questions must have 4 answer options, one correct answer, concise explanations, and no answer leakage.
entries.value: Spørsmåls must have 4 svar valg, ett riktig svar, concise explanations, og no svar leakage.

entries.source: Questions reveal the shape of confusion. A learner might know a formula but not when to use it. They might remember a historical fact but not understand the cause. They might have a strong opinion but weak evidence.
entries.value: Spørsmåls reveal shape of confusion. En elev might know en formula but ikke når å bruk det. De might husk en historisk fact but ikke forstå cause. De might have en sterk opinion but svak bevis.

entries.source: Quiz before rereading so weak areas become visible.
entries.value: Quiz før relesing so svak areas become visible.
quiz meg om et valgfritt tema

entries.source: Quiz me on these topics one question at a time. After each answer, explain the gap and increase difficulty slowly.
entries.value: Quiz meg på disse temaene, ett spørsmål om gangen. Etter hvert svar, forklar gapet og øk vanskelighetsgraden sakte.

entries.source: Quiz me on Trivia prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompter og studiesløyfe for Quiz meg i trivia

entries.source: Quiz yourself first so you can see what you actually remember and where confidence is misleading.
entries.value: Quiz deg selv først, slik at du kan se hva du faktisk husker og hvor selvtilliten villeder deg.

entries.source: Quizzes usually reveal more because they test retrieval. Rereading can help after a quiz shows what needs repair.
entries.value: Quizer avslører vanligvis mer fordi de tester gjenhenting. Å lese på nytt kan hjelpe etter at en quiz viser hva som må repareres.

entries.source: Reached across the free public platform and partner school deployments.
entries.value: Reached across gratis offentlig plattform og partner skoleutrullinger.

entries.source: Reached learners across the free platform and partner schools.
entries.value: Reached elever across gratis plattform og partner skoler.

entries.source: Read a guide, then open Learn Anything to get a plain-language model of the topic.
entries.value: Les en veiledning, deretter åpne Lær hva som helst å get en plain-språk modusl of tema.

entries.source: Read a guide, then practise here.
entries.value: Les en veiledning, og øv her.

entries.source: Read a hard text more actively
entries.value: Les en vanskelig tekst mer aktivt

entries.source: Read one thing, then do the next thing.
entries.value: Les én ting, og gjør deretter neste ting.

entries.source: Read the response back and mark what sounds unlike you.
entries.value: Les response back og mark hva sounds unlike du.

entries.source: Read these first, then move into practice.
entries.value: Les disse first, deretter gå til øving.
Les, oppsummer og still spørsmål til tekster
Les, oppsummer og still spørsmål ved tekster.
Les, og øv deretter med én gang.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Lesing en KI response er ikke samme as læring. After første svar, spør modus å lag du do noe med idea.

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.
entries.value: Lesepartner KI-læringsmodus er en fokusert måte å bruke KI til læring på i stedet for passiv svarinnsamling. Modusen er bygget rundt en bestemt jobb: Ta med et tekstutdrag eller en bokidé og bygg forståelse gjennom sammendrag, ordforråd, slutninger og samtale.

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode: practical guide
Reading Companion prompts and study loop
Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: Lesing notes feels productive. Remembering them later er ekte test.

entries.source: Ready to try the first mode?
entries.value: Klar til å prøve den første modusen?

entries.source: Ready to try the learning modes?
Ready to try this subject route?
entries.value: Klar til å prøve denne fagruten?
Resonner deg gjennom en vanskelig idé

entries.source: Reason through screenshots, diagrams, and homework images
entries.value: Resonner deg frem ved hjelp av skjermbilder, diagrammer og bilder av lekser

entries.source: Recall first, correct, reschedule missed items sooner, and summarize next review.
entries.value: Recall first, correct, reschedule missed items sooner, og summarize neste repetisjon.

entries.source: Recall later. Turn the weak spot into a card in Flashcard Builder or a short quiz in Quiz Me On Trivia.
entries.value: Recall later. Gjør svak spot til en kort in Flashcard-bygger eller en kort quiz in Quiz meg i trivia.

entries.source: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Motta et tidsreise-pass, klarer en reiseveiledning, og utforsk deretter et spesifikt historisk samfunn gjennom scener, kart, tidslinjer, mennesker, regler, inventar og bevis.

entries.source: Recommend a focus preset based on the learner's task and environment.
entries.value: Recommend en focus preset based on elev's oppgave og environment.

entries.source: Recommended inspir citation and backlink targets
Recommended pages and anchor text for citations.
entries.value: Anbefalte sider og ankertekst for siteringer.
Hent deg inn etter en tapt dag
Kom deg videre etter å ha bommet på et mål

entries.source: Reference links, public facts, press context, and citation-friendly details.
entries.value: Reference lenker, offentlig facts, press kontekst, og sitering-friendly details.

entries.source: Reference these pages when writing about inspir.
entries.value: Reference disse sider når skriving om inspir.

entries.source: Refine questions, organize evidence, identify gaps, and draft outlines.
entries.value: Refine spørsmål, organize bevis, identifiser hull, og utkast outlines.

entries.source: Reflect on what blocked progress before changing the plan.
entries.value: Reflekter on hva blocked progress før changing plan.

entries.source: Reflect, reframe, plan tiny actions, and celebrate evidence of progress.
entries.value: Reflect, reframe, planlegg tiny actions, og celebrate bevis of progress.

entries.source: Reject unsafe experiments and offer safe simulations or household-safe alternatives.
entries.value: Reject unsafe experiments og offer safe simulations eller household-safe alternatives.

entries.source: Related category hubs help search visitors and learners find the next useful branch without falling back to a generic blog archive.
entries.value: Related category hubs hjelp search visitors og elever finn neste nyttig branch uten falling back å en generisk blogg archive.
Husk ideer ved hjelp av levende steder

entries.source: Remind, suggest break activities, and help the learner restart cleanly.
entries.value: Remind, suggest break activities, og hjelp elev restart cleanly.

entries.source: Repair one weak concept with an explanation or worked example.
entries.value: Reparer ett svak begrep med en explanation eller worked eksempel.

entries.source: Repair the weakest concept with a simpler explanation.
entries.value: Reparer svakeste begrep med en simpler explanation.

entries.source: Replace passive rereading with retrieval, feedback, correction, and spaced review.
entries.value: Replace passive relesing med retrieval, tilbakemelding, correction, og spaced repetisjon.

entries.source: Request diagnosis. Ask what your answer reveals about your understanding.
entries.value: Request diagnosis. Spør hva din svar reveals om din forståelse.

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Request tilbakemelding on part som felt usikkert.

entries.source: Requires a modern web browser with JavaScript enabled.
entries.value: Krever en moderne nettleser med JavaScript aktivert.

entries.source: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a broad topic into research questions, search terms, outlines, and source notes.
entries.value: Forskningsassistent KI-læringsmodus er en fokusert måte å bruke KI til læring på i stedet for passiv svarinnsamling. Modusen er bygget rundt en bestemt jobb: Gjør et bredt tema om til forskningsspørsmål, søkeord, disposisjoner og kildenotater.

entries.source: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode: practical guide
Research Assistant prompts and study loop

entries.value: Gjør research uten å miste tråden

entries.source: Research, source criticism, metacognition, systems thinking, and decision support for sharper judgment.
entries.value: Research, kilde criticism, metacognition, systems thinking, og decision support for sharper judgment.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Svar før du ber om løsningen.
Start på nytt når læring føles vanskelig
Start på nytt når læringen føles vanskelig.

entries.source: Restate the problem, ask for the learner's first step, or provide the smallest useful hint.
entries.value: Restate problem, spør for elev's første steg, eller provide minste nyttig hint.

entries.source: Retrieval, feedback, homework hints, oral practice, and game-like study loops that make learners answer.
entries.value: Retrieval, tilbakemelding, leksehint, oral øving, og game-like studiesløyfer som lag elever svar.
Avslør svar når du er klar
Vis svar når du er klar.

entries.source: Review learning activity and next moves
Review the public/private boundaries behind guest modes and saved chats.
entries.value: Repeter public/private grenser behind gjestemoduss og saved chats.

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.
entries.value: Repeter uten å se på baksiden.
Revider uten å miste stemmen din

entries.source: Rewrite in your own words and ask what improved or weakened.
entries.value: Rewrite in din own words og spør hva improved eller weakened.

entries.source: Robots rules allow Google, standard search crawlers, and major AI discovery crawlers on public pages, while blocking API routes, admin routes, and reset flows.
entries.value: Robots regler allow Google, standard search crawlere, og majeller KI discovery crawlere on offentlige sider, while blocking API ruter, admin ruter, og reset flows.

entries.source: Roleplay one turn at a time, correct gently, and add better phrasing.
entries.value: Roleplay ett gjør at en tid, riktig gently, og add bedre phrasing.

entries.source: Roleplay one turn, respond naturally, pause for feedback when useful, and retry.
entries.value: Roleplay ett turn, respond naturally, pause for tilbakemelding når useful, og retry.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: Rollespillscenario KI-læringsmodus er en fokusert måte å bruke KI til læring på i stedet for passiv svarinnsamling. Modusen er bygget rundt en bestemt jobb: Øv på forhandling, konflikt, kundestøtte, ledelse eller andre samtaler med høy innsats.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode: practical guide
Roleplay Scenario prompts and study loop
Run a shared study rhythm for friends or classmates with synchronized goals, check-ins, and debrief questions.
entries.value: Kjør en delt studierytme for venner eller klassekamerater med synkroniserte mål, innsjekkinger og debriefingsspørsmål.

entries.source: Run a Socratic thinking environment where the learner discovers understanding through disciplined questioning rather than passive explanation.
entries.value: Run en sokratisk thinking environment hvor elev discovers forståelse gjennom disciplined spørsmåling heller enn passive explanation.

entries.source: Run an adaptive lesson canvas where the learner acts early and the interface changes around their evidence of understanding.
entries.value: Run en adaptive lesson canvas hvor elev acts early og interface changes rundt deres bevis of forståelse.

entries.source: Run focus and break sessions that keep counting while you move between chats, tabs, and mini apps. It can ring from the background when a session ends.
entries.value: Kjør fokus- og pauseøkter som fortsetter å telle mens du navigerer mellom chatter, faner og miniapper. Den kan ringe fra bakgrunnen når en økt er ferdig.

entries.source: Run or reason through the change yourself.
entries.value: Run eller reason gjennom change deg selv.

entries.source: Run spaced retrieval sessions and build review schedules.
entries.value: Run spaced retrieval økter og bygg repetisjon schedules.

entries.source: safe AI learning tool for students
Save the corrected mistake as a checklist or flashcard.
entries.value: Lagre korrigert feil as en checklist eller flashcard.

entries.source: Save the final mistake or insight as review material.
entries.value: Lagre endelige feil eller innsikt as repetisjon materiale.

entries.source: Saved user conversations use private identifiers, are not included in the sitemap or AI discovery files, and should not be treated as public source material.
entries.value: Saved user samtaler bruk privat identifiers, er ikke included in nettstedskart eller KI discovery files, og bør ikke be treated as offentlig kildematerialee.

entries.source: Say the goal in ordinary language.
Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: Si hva du tror skjer, så diagnostiserer din læringspartner skjulte misoppfatninger med enkle tester.

entries.source: Schedule quizzes and recall before rereading so the plan reveals weak spots.
entries.value: Schedule quizer og recall før relesing so planlegg reveals svak spots.

entries.source: Schedule the next repetition while the miss is still fresh.
entries.value: Schedule neste repetition while miss er still fresh.

entries.source: School and CSR pathways for funded access
entries.value: Skole- og CSR-stier for finansiert tilgang

entries.source: School deployments can be adapted around custom content, workflows, prompts, and NCERT-aligned learning needs where appropriate.
entries.value: Skole deployments kan be adapted rundt custom innhold, arbeidsflyter, prompter, og NCERT-aligned læringsbehov hvor appropriate.

entries.source: School rollouts can be planned around student privacy, staff oversight, and the practical boundaries a learning community needs.
entries.value: Skole rollouts kan be planned rundt student personvern, staff oversight, og praktisk grenser en læring fellesskap trenger.

entries.source: Schools and partners can build from the public product toward tailored, confidential, and subsidized deployments.
entries.value: Skoler og partners kan bygg fra offentlig produkt toward tailored, confidential, og subsidized deployments.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate inspir through public guest modes first, then explore tailored AI learning spaces with custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, and funded access paths.
entries.value: Skoler kan evaluate inspir gjennom offentlige gjestemoduser first, deretter explore tailored KI læring spaces med custom arbeidsflyter, confidentiality planning, curriculum trenger, og funded access stier.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: Skoler kan evaluate offentlige moduser first, deretter discuss tailored arbeidsflyter, confidentiality planning, innhold trenger, og funded access.

entries.source: Schools can offer white-labelled AI chat experiences tailored to their learners, including NCERT-aligned content and workflows, with usage funded by partner schools or CSR sponsorship.
entries.value: Skoler kan tilby white-label KI-chatopplevelser tilpasset elevene sine, inkludert NCERT-tilpasset innhold og arbeidsflyter, med bruk finansiert av partnerskoler eller CSR-sponsing.

entries.source: Schools can start by trying the public modes, then move toward a tailored version when they need custom workflows, content alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Skoler kan start by prøver offentlige moduser, deretter gå toward en tailored version når de trenger custom arbeidsflyter, innhold alignment, eller funded access.

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Skoler kan test offentlige gjestemoduser first, deretter bruk skoler side å explore tailored arbeidsflyter, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned valg, og funded access.

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.
entries.value: Naturfaglig labpartner KI-læringsmodus er en fokusert måte å bruke KI til læring på i stedet for passiv svarinnsamling. Modusen er bygget rundt en bestemt jobb: Planlegg trygge demonstrasjoner, forstå variabler, forutsi utfall og resonnér ut fra bevis som en forsker.

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode: practical guide
Science Lab Partner prompts and study loop
Search engines see pages. Learners need sequences. These paths connect the public modes into practical study loops for understanding, homework, exam prep, and exploration.
entries.value: Søkemotorer ser sider. Elever trenger sekvenser. Disse stiene kobler de offentlige modusene til praktiske studieløkker for forståelse, lekser, eksamensforberedelse og utforsking.

entries.source: Search pages, AI answer engines, and learners all get the same promise: public, useful, canonical entrypoints that open directly inside the learning experience.
entries.value: Search sider, KI svarmotorer, og elever all get samme promise: public, useful, canonical innganger som åpne directly inni læring opplevelse.
